codeSystems.name: AllLanguages
codeSystems.title: All Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all possible codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

codeSystems.name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
codeSystems.title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
codeSystems.description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

codeSystems.name: ConditionCategoryCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Category Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

codeSystems.name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition Clinical Status Codes
codeSystems.description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

codeSystems.name: ConditionProblemDiagnosisCodes
codeSystems.title: Condition/Problem/Diagnosis Codes
codeSystems.description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStage
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage
codeSystems.description: Value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

codeSystems.name: ConditionStageType
codeSystems.title: Condition Stage Type
codeSystems.description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

codeSystems.name: ConditionVerificationStatus
codeSystems.title: Condition Verification Status
codeSystems.description: The verification status to support or decline the clinical status of the condition or diagnosis.

codeSystems.name: CommonLanguages
codeSystems.title: Common Languages
codeSystems.description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (see http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

codeSystems.name: ParticipationRoleType
codeSystems.title: Participation Role Type
codeSystems.description: This FHIR value set is comprised of Actor participation Type codes, which can be used to value FHIR agents, actors, and other role elements. The codes are intended to express how the agent participated in some activity. Sometimes refered to the agent functional-role relative to the activity.

codeSystems.name: ObsVS
codeSystems.title: Observation ValueSet
codeSystems.description: Use all LOINC codes for observations
